name: Snakes on an Extradimensional Plane
short_description: Abstract HTC Vive game where you help adventurous space mice with tiny little jetpack escape the glowing snakes! Collect powerups for points and compete on the leaderboards!
detailed_description:
Help the astronaut mice escape the giant neon snakes, and score some points while you're at it!

A new take on the classic "Snake" concept, SoaEP is a small game for the HTC Vive, and other SteamVR headsets, that'll really get your arms swinging!

Features


  • Steam Leaderboards support - Compete with your friends!
  • [COMING SOON]Achievements! - Get arbitrary rewards for arbitrary tasks!
  • Neon Snakes! - Glowy, pink and long!
  • Powerups! - Make the snakes flee or slow down!
  • Music by Kevin McLeod, the genius at Incompetech!
  • Space Rodents! - What more could you possibly want? They've got tiny jetpacks!
